chunks.text: MATLAB | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar MATLAB In recent years, MATLAB licensing for campus has been handled by a MATLAB Funding Consortium, whereby the departments that are chief users of MATLAB jointly

epartments that are chief users of MATLAB jointly pay the licensing cost, and all campus members benefit by having access to MATLAB. As part of the Consortium representing the largest group of users, the College of Engineering has generally been resp

the College of Engineering has generally been responsible for about half of the campus MATLAB licensing cost, with the EECS Department responsible for half of the College cost. Individual MATLAB licenses may be obtained as described on the Campus Sof

ses may be obtained as described on the Campus Software Central website . This is the recommended choice for using MATLAB on laptops or personally-owned devices. For shared group or lab computers, where Individual licensing is not practical, MATLAB c

re Individual licensing is not practical, MATLAB can still be used with campus license servers. Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are liste
ervice Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
